requirement_topic.en: Smart Inverter Communication Interoperability (IEEE 1547 / SunSpec Modbus)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能逆变器通信互操作性（IEEE 1547 / SunSpec Modbus）
requirement_topic.zht: 智慧型逆變器通訊互操作性（IEEE 1547 / SunSpec Modbus）

summary.en: IEEE 1547-2018 requires distributed energy resources (DERs) to support communication interfaces enabling monitoring and control of grid support functions (voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power, volt-var, etc.). California Rule 21 Phase 2/3 mandates smart-inverter advanced functions using SunSpec Modbus or IEEE 2030.5 (SEP 2) as the communication protocol for utility-interactive inverters interconnected to California distribution grids. No single federal mandate applies nationally; requirements are largely utility-tariff and state-rule driven.
summary.zh: IEEE 1547-2018 要求分布式能源（DER）支持通信接口，以实现对电网支持功能（电压/频率穿越、无功功率、volt-var等）的监控。加利福尼亚州Rule 21第二、三阶段强制要求并网智能逆变器具备高级功能，并使用SunSpec Modbus或IEEE 2030.5（SEP 2）作为通信协议。目前美国尚无统一的联邦强制要求，各项规定主要由各州规则及电力公司电价条款驱动。
summary.zht: IEEE 1547-2018 要求分散式能源（DER）支援通訊介面，以實現對電網支援功能（電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率、volt-var等）的監控。加利福尼亞州Rule 21第二、三階段強制要求併網智慧型逆變器具備進階功能，並使用SunSpec Modbus或IEEE 2030.5（SEP 2）作為通訊協定。目前美國尚無統一聯邦強制要求，各項規定主要由各州規則及電力公司電價條款驅動。

standards_or_laws: IEEE 1547-2018 (Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources)
California CPUC Rule 21 Phase 2 / Phase 3 (Smart Inverter Requirements)

summary.en: Chinese grid-tied PV inverters are typically certified to NB/T 32004 (technical requirements for PV inverters) and GB/T 19964 (PV power station grid connection). Communication interfaces commonly use Modbus RTU/TCP per manufacturer convention, but standardised smart-inverter interoperability protocols equivalent to SunSpec or IEEE 2030.5 are not broadly mandated for export products. GB/T 22239 (classified protection of cybersecurity) addresses information-system security tiering domestically but does not prescribe inverter-level communication protocols.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器通常依据NB/T 32004（光伏逆变器技术规范）和GB/T 19964（光伏发电站接入电网技术规定）进行认证。通信接口普遍采用Modbus RTU/TCP，但针对出口产品，目前并未广泛强制要求与SunSpec或IEEE 2030.5等同的标准化智能逆变器互操作协议。GB/T 22239（网络安全等级保护）在国内规范信息系统安全分级，但未规定逆变器级别的通信协议。
summary.zht: 中國併網光伏逆變器通常依據NB/T 32004（光伏逆變器技術規範）和GB/T 19964（光伏發電站接入電網技術規定）進行認證。通訊介面普遍採用Modbus RTU/TCP，但針對出口產品，目前並未廣泛強制要求與SunSpec或IEEE 2030.5等同的標準化智慧型逆變器互操作協定。GB/T 22239（網路安全等級保護）在國內規範資訊系統安全分級，但未規定逆變器層級的通訊協定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 (光伏发电站接入电网技术规定)
GB/T 22239-2019 (信息安全技术 网络安全等级保护基本要求)

gap.en: Chinese-manufactured inverters commonly lack factory-enabled SunSpec Modbus register maps or IEEE 2030.5 / SEP 2 stacks required by California Rule 21 Phase 2/3 and expected under IEEE 1547-2018. Technical documentation (register maps, protocol compliance statements) is frequently absent or only available in Chinese. Retrofitting or firmware-enabling these protocols post-manufacture is possible but adds cost and re-certification risk. GB/T 22239 cybersecurity tiering applies domestically to information systems and does not align with US utility-interconnection cyber expectations.
gap.zh: 中国制造的逆变器通常未在出厂时启用加州Rule 21第二、三阶段及IEEE 1547-2018所要求的SunSpec Modbus寄存器映射或IEEE 2030.5 / SEP 2协议栈。技术文档（寄存器映射、协议合规声明）往往缺失或仅提供中文版本。出厂后通过固件升级支持上述协议在技术上可行，但会增加成本及重新认证风险。GB/T 22239网络安全等级保护适用于国内信息系统，与美国电网互联的网络安全要求存在不对齐。
gap.zht: 中國製造的逆變器通常未在出廠時啟用加州Rule 21第二、三階段及IEEE 1547-2018所要求的SunSpec Modbus暫存器映射或IEEE 2030.5 / SEP 2協定堆疊。技術文件（暫存器映射、協定合規聲明）往往缺失或僅提供中文版本。出廠後透過韌體升級支援上述協定在技術上可行，但會增加成本及重新認證風險。GB/T 22239網路安全等級保護適用於國內資訊系統，與美國電網互聯的網路安全要求存在不對齊。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEEE 1547-2018 is mandatory for new DER interconnections in the majority of US states that have adopted it; California Rule 21 Phase 1 autonomous functions (mandatory since September 8, 2017 per CPUC D.14-12-035) and Phase 2/3 communications and advanced functions (mandatory per D.16-06-052 and Resolution E-4898, effective February 22, 2019) are mandatory for California IOU-tariff interconnections; no single federal mandate applies nationally — state utility tariffs are the primary enforcement mechanism
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for export products; GB/T 22239 applies domestically to classified information systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Chinese-export grid-tied PV inverters typically require firmware/protocol updates and supplementary English documentation to meet California Rule 21 Phase 2/3 and IEEE 1547-2018 communication requirements before US interconnection approval. Consult the applicable utility tariff and a qualified interconnection engineer for project-specific obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国出口并网光伏逆变器通常需要固件/协议升级及补充英文文档，方可满足加州Rule 21第二、三阶段及IEEE 1547-2018通信要求，进而获得美国并网批准。项目具体义务请咨询适用的电力公司电价条款及具备资质的并网工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國出口併網光伏逆變器通常需要韌體／協定升級及補充英文文件，方可滿足加州Rule 21第二、三階段及IEEE 1547-2018通訊要求，進而獲得美國併網批准。專案具體義務請諮詢適用的電力公司電價條款及具備資質的併網工程師。

requirement_topic.zh: 逆变器网络安全（UL 2900系列 / NIST指南）
requirement_topic.zht: 逆變器網路安全（UL 2900系列 / NIST指引）

summary.en: The UL 2900 series (UL 2900-1 general, UL 2900-2-3 industrial/energy) provides a voluntary but market-recognised cybersecurity testing framework for network-connectable products including grid-tied inverters. NIST IR 8259 and NIST SP 800-82 provide guidance on IoT device cybersecurity and industrial control system security respectively. The US has no single federal law mandating inverter-specific cybersecurity certification as of the access date; however, utilities and project developers increasingly require evidence of cybersecurity controls (patch management, authentication, encrypted communications) in procurement and interconnection agreements. Executive Order 14028 (2021) and CISA advisories have raised awareness of supply-chain cyber risk for grid equipment from foreign manufacturers.
summary.zh: UL 2900系列（UL 2900-1通用版、UL 2900-2-3工业/能源版）为包括并网逆变器在内的网络连接产品提供了一套自愿采用但市场认可度较高的网络安全测试框架。NIST IR 8259和NIST SP 800-82分别就物联网设备网络安全和工业控制系统安全提供指导。截至本文访问日期，美国尚无针对逆变器网络安全认证的单一联邦强制性法规；但电力公司和项目开发商在采购和并网协议中越来越多地要求提供网络安全控制措施（补丁管理、身份验证、加密通信）的证明。2021年第14028号行政令及CISA公告已提升各界对外国制造商电网设备供应链网络安全风险的关注度。
summary.zht: UL 2900系列（UL 2900-1通用版、UL 2900-2-3工業／能源版）為包括併網逆變器在內的網路連接產品提供了一套自願採用但市場認可度較高的網路安全測試框架。NIST IR 8259和NIST SP 800-82分別就物聯網設備網路安全和工業控制系統安全提供指引。截至本文存取日期，美國尚無針對逆變器網路安全認證的單一聯邦強制性法規；但電力公司和專案開發商在採購和併網協議中越來越多地要求提供網路安全控制措施（修補管理、身分驗證、加密通訊）的證明。2021年第14028號行政令及CISA公告已提升各界對外國製造商電網設備供應鏈網路安全風險的關注度。

standards_or_laws: UL 2900-1 (Standard for Software Cybersecurity for Network-Connectable Products)
UL 2900-2-3 (Particular Requirements for Industrial Control Systems)
NIST IR 8259 (IoT Device Cybersecurity Capability Core Baseline)
NIST SP 800-82 Rev. 3 (Guide to OT Security)
CISA ICS-CERT Advisories (grid equipment supply-chain risk)

summary.en: GB/T 22239-2019 (Classified Protection of Cybersecurity, 等级保护 2.0) is the primary domestic cybersecurity framework applied to information systems in China, covering network infrastructure, data security, and access control across five tiers. It is applied to operators of critical information infrastructure (CII) within China. Chinese inverter manufacturers may hold GB/T 22239 compliance for their internal systems but this does not equate to product-level cybersecurity certification equivalent to UL 2900 for exported devices. GB/T 37078 (cybersecurity for industrial control systems) provides additional domestic ICS guidance.
summary.zh: GB/T 22239-2019（信息安全技术 网络安全等级保护基本要求，即等保2.0）是中国主要的国内网络安全框架，适用于国内信息系统，涵盖网络基础设施、数据安全及五个等级的访问控制。该标准面向中国境内关键信息基础设施（CII）运营者。中国逆变器制造商可能针对其内部系统持有GB/T 22239合规证明，但这并不等同于出口设备达到UL 2900所对应的产品级网络安全认证要求。GB/T 37078（工业控制系统信息安全）为国内工业控制系统提供额外指导。
summary.zht: GB/T 22239-2019（資訊安全技術 網路安全等級保護基本要求，即等保2.0）是中國主要的國內網路安全框架，適用於國內資訊系統，涵蓋網路基礎設施、資料安全及五個等級的存取控制。該標準面向中國境內關鍵資訊基礎設施（CII）營運者。中國逆變器製造商可能針對其內部系統持有GB/T 22239合規證明，但這並不等同於出口設備達到UL 2900所對應的產品級網路安全認證要求。GB/T 37078（工業控制系統資訊安全）為國內工業控制系統提供額外指引。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 22239-2019 (信息安全技术 网络安全等级保护基本要求)
GB/T 37078-2019 (工业控制系统信息安全 第1部分：通则)

gap.en: GB/T 22239 is an operator/system-level framework applied within China and does not translate into product-level cybersecurity certification for exported inverters. UL 2900 certification (voluntary but increasingly requested) requires independent third-party penetration testing and vulnerability disclosure processes that Chinese manufacturers rarely complete for export models. US utilities and federal procurement channels (post-EO 14028) are scrutinising foreign-manufactured grid equipment for undisclosed remote-access capabilities, lack of patch lifecycles, and supply-chain transparency — areas where Chinese inverter documentation is frequently deficient. No direct Chinese equivalent to UL 2900-2-3 product certification exists for inverter exports.
gap.zh: GB/T 22239是适用于中国境内的运营商/系统级框架，无法等效于出口逆变器的产品级网络安全认证。UL 2900认证（自愿性但日益被要求）需经独立第三方渗透测试及漏洞披露流程，而中国制造商针对出口型号鲜少完成此类认证。美国电力公司及联邦采购渠道（第14028号行政令实施后）正对外国制造电网设备的未公开远程访问功能、补丁生命周期缺失及供应链透明度进行严格审查——而中国逆变器文档在上述方面普遍存在不足。目前尚无直接对应UL 2900-2-3产品认证的中国出口逆变器等效标准。
gap.zht: GB/T 22239是適用於中國境內的營運商／系統級框架，無法等效於出口逆變器的產品級網路安全認證。UL 2900認證（自願性但日益被要求）需經獨立第三方滲透測試及漏洞揭露流程，而中國製造商針對出口型號鮮少完成此類認證。美國電力公司及聯邦採購管道（第14028號行政令實施後）正對外國製造電網設備的未公開遠端存取功能、修補生命週期缺失及供應鏈透明度進行嚴格審查——而中國逆變器文件在上述方面普遍存在不足。目前尚無直接對應UL 2900-2-3產品認證的中國出口逆變器等效標準。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — UL 2900 certification is not federally mandated for PV inverters as of the access date; the DOE is developing voluntary Cybersecurity Baselines for Electric Distribution Systems and DERs (implementation guidance considering both voluntary and mandatory settings); UL 2900 is increasingly required by utilities and project developers contractually; federal scrutiny elevated post-EO 14028 (2021) and CISA ICS advisories targeting foreign-manufactured grid equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for export; GB/T 22239 mandatory only for domestic CII operators within China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Chinese-export inverters generally lack UL 2900-series cybersecurity certification and associated documentation (vulnerability disclosure policy, patch lifecycle, penetration test reports). This gap is increasingly material in US utility procurement and may affect project financing or interconnection approval in markets with heightened supply-chain scrutiny. Verify current federal and state requirements with qualified legal and engineering counsel before procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国出口逆变器通常缺乏UL 2900系列网络安全认证及相关文档（漏洞披露政策、补丁生命周期、渗透测试报告）。在供应链审查趋严的市场中，该差距在美国电力公司采购中日益重要，可能影响项目融资或并网批准。采购前请咨询具备资质的法律及工程顾问，以核实当前联邦及州级要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國出口逆變器通常缺乏UL 2900系列網路安全認證及相關文件（漏洞揭露政策、修補生命週期、滲透測試報告）。在供應鏈審查趨嚴的市場中，該差距在美國電力公司採購中日益重要，可能影響專案融資或併網批准。採購前請諮詢具備資質的法律及工程顧問，以核實當前聯邦及州級要求。
